raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "tee nezels tahs wezzas pohstu
Weetas/ tu likfi stiprus Pamat-
tus lithds Raddu Raddeem/ un
tu tapfi nofankts tas Aismuh-
retajs to Plaisunu/ un Jstaiffi-
tajs to Zettu / ka tur dshwoht
warr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja tu tawu Kahju atkah-
pina tahs Swehdeenas deht/ un
ne darri / kas tew patihk manna
fwehta Deena/ un ja tu to Dus-
fefchanas-Deenu fanz weennu Ee-
lighfinofchanu/ to Swehtumu ta
KUNGA/ kas pagohdinajams
irr. Jo ta pagohdinasi tu win-
xu/ ka tu ne darri tawus Zettus/
neds dsenn tawu paschu Kahri-
bu / un runna to Wahrdu (no
tahs.)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad preezafees tu eeksch
ta KUNGA/ un es eezeltchu te-
wi pahr tahs Gemmes Augsti-
bahn/ un es barrotchu tew ar to
eemantojamu Teefu tawa Tehwa
Jehkaba/ jo ta KUNGA Mutte
irr to runnaift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un starp jnhfu Deewu/ un jnhfu
Grehti apsflepj winna Waigu
no jums/ ka tas ne klanfa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo jnhfu Rohkas irr ar
Aftinim tagahnitas/ un jnhfu
Pirksi ar Netaisnibu/ jnhfu
Luhpas runna Wiltibu/ un jnh-
fu Mehle tsdohnia Nepateesibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Neweens irr/ kas no Taif-
nbas fluddinatu / un neweens/
kas preetizzigi teefatu/ tee patau-
jahs us Nelectibu / un runna
Mellus/ ar Laanuma irr tee ap-
gruhtinati / un dseinde Netaisf-
nibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee perre Tschubsko Pan-
tus/ un ausch Strnekftta Tihk-
lus. Kas no winnu Banteem
ehf/ tam buhs mirt/ un kad tee
tohp famihti / tad islez weena
Ohdse.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winnu Sirneffta Tihkl
ne derr par Drehbehm / un ar
winno Darbu tee ne warr ap-
segtees/ winnu Darbi irr pahr-
grohsiti Darbi / un Blehdibas
Darrifchana irr winno Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winnu Kahjas tekk us
Laanunu/ un steidsahs nenosee-
dsigas Aftinis isleet / winnu
Dohmas irr pahrgrohsitas Doh-
mas/ Pohstischana un Satreek-
tchana irr us winnu Zelfkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "To Zettu ta Meerna tee ne
sinn/ un Teeta ne irr winnu
Gahjunms/ tee pahrgrohsa ta-
wus Zettus preeksch fewim.
Wits/ kas us teem staiga / tas-
ne sinna to Meern.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht irr ta Teefa tahfu
ne
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
